description.default: Time-based one-time passwords (TOTP) compatible with Google Authenticator. Paste otpauth:// URIs to add accounts.
description.zh: TOTP 一次性密码，兼容 Google Authenticator。粘贴 otpauth:// 链接添加账号。
description.ja: TOTP ワンタイムパスワード。Google Authenticator 互換。otpauth:// URI を貼って追加。

aglets.name: System Monitor
aglets.description: OS CPU / memory / disk dogfood. Subscribes to the `sysmon` stdio plugin's `cpu` resource — plugin pushes a sample every 1s, the host fans it out to `onCpuSample` via the plugin event bus. No polling.
